title: cynoglossum hispidum
intro: Cynoglossum hispidum, also known as the hairy tongue flower, is a plant species in the borage family that is native to Europe and Asia. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Cynoglossum hispidum include its ability to treat respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and coughs, as well as its potential to reduce fever and alleviate skin conditions. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat a variety of health issues.
